name: career-skills
description: AI agent skills for every stage of your career — searching, pivoting, growing, and thriving. Built by Teal.

plugins.name: career-skills
plugins.description: 16 composable career skills unified by a shared career-profile — resume review, comp analysis, interview prep, win logging, career check-ins, and more — across searching, pivoting, growing, and thriving. Connects to the Teal MCP for live job-market data.
